economic_notes: Nation has undertaken a town centre development within its community. Holds 51% interest in Spirit Bay Development Limited Partnership and 99% interest in M'inuw'ilum Marina Limited Partnership. Also holds 20% in Salish Strait Seafoods Ltd., and wholly owns Sc'ianew Development Corporation and 1106670 BC Ltd.
notes: Audit is qualified on three grounds: (1) tangible capital assets not fully recorded per PSAB requirements for roads, bridges, water/utility systems; (2) investments in GBEs and limited partnerships could not be verified as financial statements were not audited or available; (3) town centre development expenditures subject to contingency for potential repayment. GBEs accounted for by modified equity method include Salish Strait Seafoods Ltd. (20%), Sc'ianew Development Corporation (100%), and 1106670 BC Ltd. (100%). Limited partnerships include Spirit Bay Development LP (51%) and M'inuw'ilum Marina LP (99%). Total government transfers calculated as ISC + Prior Year ISC Adjustment + CMHC + FNHA + Fisheries and Oceans Canada + Natural Resources Canada + BC Gaming Funds + Province of BC.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
